steps.title: Connect impact to orbital change
steps.content: NASA crashed a probe into Dimorphos, and the following sentence says Dimorphos's orbital period was permanently altered. The second event is the result of the first.

steps.title: Use the result transition
steps.content: A would add an independent fact, B would specify a detail rather than a result, and D would compare two things. The matching transition signals consequence. The answer is C.
